data.title: Johnson & Johnson presents 17 abstracts featuring major depressive disorder data at 2025 ECNP Congress, includes CAPLYTA Phase 3 analysis on sexual function in MDD.
data.description: 17 different summaries from various parts of the Company's selection and development display fresh clinical and real-world data pertaining to major depressive disorder and treatment-resistant depression. A recent supplementary analysis of the CAPLYTA® (lumateperone) Phase 3 information explores the influence on sexual function in individuals with MDD.

data.title: Reitar Logtech partners with Xianmu Tech, serving over 300,000 catering businesses to launch tokenized supply chain ecosystem.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, Reitar Logtech Holdings Limited (NASDAQ:RITR), a leading integrated Property + Logistics Technology (PLT) solutions platform in Asia, revealed a strategic partnership with Hangzhou Xianmu Technology Co., Ltd., China's top casual catering supply chain provider. Xianmu offers smart supply chain solutions for the casual catering sector across 120 major cities, serving over 300,000 restaurant clients. The company's founder, Jiang Tao, and other co-founders who previously worked at Alibaba, bring solid expertise in supply chain and digital transformation. Xianmu has successfully executed various financing rounds and technological advancements. The collaboration aims to develop a global tokenized smart supply chain ecosystem for casual catering, introducing a new era of digital finance to the industry.

data.title: Anavex presents study on Blarcamesine's benefits for Alzheimer's care at Alzheimer Europe Conference.
data.description: Title of Presentation: "Improving Alzheimer’s Disease Care: Enhancing Convenience for Patients and Families through Oral Blarcamesine"The presentation will focus on the advancement of Alzheimer’s disease care by introducing the use of oral Blarcamesine. This new approach aims to provide convenience for patients and their families. The presentation will highlight the benefits of utilizing Blarcamesine in the treatment of Alzheimer’s disease, showcasing how it can improve the overall quality of care.Key takeaways from the presentation will include the effectiveness of oral Blarcamesine in managing Alzheimer’s disease symptoms, the ease of administration for patients, and the positive impact on the daily lives of both patients and their families. This innovative solution is expected to revolutionize Alzheimer’s disease care by offering a more convenient and efficient treatment option.Attendees can expect to learn about the potential benefits of incorporating oral Blarcamesine into Alzheimer’s disease care, with a focus on enhancing the well-being of patients and their families. This presentation aims to shed light on the importance of providing convenient and effective care for individuals affected by Alzheimer’s disease.

data.title: FG Nexus will ring the Nasdaq closing bell on Oct 13th, 2025 at 4:00 PM ET. (Ticker: FGNX, FGNXP)
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on October 10, 2025, FG Nexus (Nasdaq: FGNX, FGNXP) revealed its plans to ring the Nasdaq closing bell on October 13, 2025, at 4:00 PM ET.

data.title: Bombardier to showcase Global 7500, Global 6500, and Challenger 3500 at NBAA-BACE 2025 in Las Vegas.
data.description: In Montreal, on October 10, 2025, Bombardier revealed its involvement in the 2025 NBAA Business Aviation Convention & Exhibition (NBAA-BACE), scheduled for October 14-16 at Henderson Executive Airport in Las Vegas. A prominent figure in business aviation worldwide, Bombardier is set to exhibit three of its flagship aircraft, namely the Global 7500, Global 6500, and Challenger 3500, at the event. Additionally, the company will showcase its top-rated service portfolio during the convention.

data.title: Freeport schedules conference call in November 2025 to report on September 8, 2025, mud rush incident at Grasberg Block Cave.
data.description: Phoenix-based mining company Freeport (NYSE: FCX) stated its intention to host a conference call in November 2025 to address the mud rush incident at the Grasberg Block Cave on September 8, 2025. The company will share updates on the investigation, damage assessments, and future operational plans. Freeport will also present its long-term operational and financial projections for PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI). Both Freeport and PTFI are actively involved in investigating the incident and planning future operations. The specific date of the conference call is yet to be announced.

data.title: Telegram founder Pavel Durov warns of eroding online freedom by governments on his birthday, criticizes Western nations for implementing restrictive laws, accuses them of turning information exchange into a tool of control.
data.description: Pavel Durov, the founder of Telegram (CRYPTO: TON), used his 41st birthday to issue a cautionary message about the increasing erosion of online freedom by governments. In a post on his official Telegram channel, Durov expressed a lack of celebratory spirit, instead warning of a "dark, dystopian" future. He criticized countries like the U.K., Australia, and members of the European Union for implementing laws mandating online age verification, widespread scanning of private messages, and digital identification systems. Durov accused democratic nations of manipulating the free flow of information for control purposes and cautioned that future generations might lose the freedoms enjoyed by his generation. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: A $11B Bitcoin whale places $900M short bets on BTC, ETH anticipating correction in prices after two month hiatus.
data.description: After a two-month hiatus, a major Bitcoin investor, known as a whale, has re-entered the market by placing short positions on Bitcoin and Ether worth hundreds of millions of dollars. This move signals a bet on the short-term drop in the prices of these cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Tech press releases roundup: Key announcements include Johnson Controls' investment in Accelsius, PayPal Ads Manager rollout, and partnership between Honeywell and LS ELECTRIC.
data.description: This week, significant tech developments were highlighted on PR Newswire. Johnson Controls revealed a substantial investment in Accelsius, while PayPal introduced its new Ads Manager platform. Additionally, Honeywell and LS ELECTRIC formed a noteworthy partnership. These announcements were made in New York on October 10, 2025. The tech sector continues to evolve with various companies making strides in innovation, with this week showcasing major initiatives in the industry.

data.title: Global nano fertilizer market expected to reach $8.77 billion by 2033 from $3.08 billion in 2024, with a 12.33% CAGR.
data.description: A recent report titled "Nano Fertilizer Global Market Analysis: Raw Material, Application Method, Crop Type, Formulation Form, Release Mechanism, Countries, and Company Analysis 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Nano Fertilizer Market is projected to grow from US$3.08 billion in 2024 to US$8.77 billion by 2033, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.33% from 2025 to 2033. The increasing demand for efficient nutrient delivery systems is expected to drive the steady growth of the nano fertilizer market in the coming years.

data.title: US economy grew by 3.8% last quarter, but half of states are seeing economies shrink. Low-income households facing financial strain.
data.description: Despite the U.S. economy expanding by 3.8% in the last quarter and unemployment remaining at 4.3%, Moody's Analytics reported that about 50% of U.S. states are witnessing a contraction in their economies. Chief Economist Mark Zandi mentioned in an interview with Fortune that 22 states are experiencing economic decline, while 16 are growing, and 13 are maintaining stability. Notably, significant states like California, Texas, and New York, which greatly contribute to the U.S. GDP, are still on a growth trajectory, aiding in keeping the nation's overall economic progression positive. Zandi highlighted the financial strain faced by low-income households, stating they are barely holding on financially, mainly due to employment providing some stability for them to sustain spending. For detailed information, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: IRS furlough affects nearly half its workforce. Expert offers tips to navigate slowdown.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, the IRS has announced a furlough impacting almost half of its staff. This development carries implications for taxpayers across the board. While presenting challenges, it also presents opportunities. Experts advise on what taxpayers can anticipate from this furlough, as well as strategies to effectively navigate through it.
